selected.p: paste clip after current (when on clip element)
selected.P: paste clip to same position on another track

clip_locked.description: Enter on a clip enters this mode. h/l moves clip, Shift stretches, Ctrl trims.
clip_locked.h/l: move clip left/right by one beat
clip_locked.Shift+H/L: shrink/extend right edge by one beat
clip_locked.Ctrl+H/L: trim/extend left edge by one beat

focus_switch.Tab: cycle tabs: trk fx → synth → inst config → piano → settings → trk fx

piano_roll_navigation.description: Default mode when viewing the piano roll (not in edit mode).
piano_roll_navigation.n: toggle note at cursor (draw or remove)
piano_roll_navigation.h/l: navigate columns (or MOVE highlighted notes left/right if highlights exist)
piano_roll_navigation.j/k: scroll up/down (or MOVE highlighted notes up/down if highlights exist)
piano_roll_navigation.Enter_with_highlights: lock highlights for STRETCHING (Right-Left-Trick on group)
piano_roll_navigation.Esc: clear highlights, or exit piano roll if no highlights

piano_roll_highlight_locked.description: After highlighting notes and pressing Enter, h/l/H/L stretch the group.
piano_roll_highlight_locked.h/l: adjust LEFT edge of all highlighted notes
piano_roll_highlight_locked.H/L: adjust RIGHT edge of all highlighted notes

piano_roll_column_selected.description: Right-Left-Trick: column is locked. h/l adjusts note edges.
piano_roll_column_selected.h/l: adjust LEFT edge of all notes in column
piano_roll_column_selected.H/L: adjust RIGHT edge of all notes in column

piano_roll_row_mode.description: Single note selected via column→row drill-down.
piano_roll_row_mode.h/l: adjust LEFT edge of single note
piano_roll_row_mode.H/L: adjust RIGHT edge of single note

edit_mode.description: Space+E enters edit mode. Navigate between individual notes, select, move, delete.

navigate.j/k: move to next note UP/DOWN within same column
navigate.h/l: jump to nearest note in prev/next column
navigate.Enter: select cursor note for moving (single-note select)

moving.trigger: plain direction after selecting, or Enter on a single note
moving.h/l: move selected notes left/right by grid step
moving.j/k: move selected notes up/down by semitone
moving.Shift+H/L: stretch RIGHT edge of selected notes (duration)
moving.Shift+J/K: stretch LEFT edge of selected notes (start position)
moving.Esc: lock notes in place, clear selection

transport_pane.h/l: navigate transport elements (BPM, Record, Loop, Metronome)
transport_pane.Enter: activate element (edit BPM, toggle record, etc.)

grid_settings.snap: on/off — notes snap to grid when moved in edit mode

clip_behavior.shrink_right_edge: Notes past the new boundary are hidden (not deleted). Expanding restores them.
clip_behavior.trim_left_edge: Notes before the new start are hidden. Expanding restores them.
clip_behavior.move_clip: h/l in clip-locked mode. Collision detection prevents overlap.
clip_behavior.duplicate: d in clip-locked mode. Creates copy right after the clip.
clip_behavior.delete: Space+D with y/n confirmation. Selects adjacent clip after delete.
clip_behavior.piano_roll_sync: Clip view always shows the selected clip. Stretching/trimming updates piano roll in real time.
